summary: Completed frontend testing of /vastgoed kiosk login page redesign. All 9 test cases passed - centered kiosk layout, PIN modal popup, password/register/superadmin forms with Terug buttons, and no 'Schermtoetsenbord' text anywhere.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kiosk login page redesign complete. All login methods work: PIN (5678 via modal popup), password, superadmin. No 'Schermtoetsenbord' button anywhere. All forms have 'Terug' back button. Live clock displays in top-right corner.

PIN modal overlay appears with backdrop blur, modal content with numpad (1-9, 0, DEL), 4-digit PIN display

'Terug' button present, email/password inputs, submit button, navigates back to main screen
